title: Yukkuricraft: Border of Magic & Tech
description: Yukkuricraft: Border of Magic & Tech is the official modpack for the Yukkuricraft server. This modpack compiles both traditional and new age mods with a focus on community building and a play style that's suitable for most Minecraft players!
body:
## Summary
Delve into the wondrous world of Gensokyo with **Yukkuricraft: Border of Magic & Tech**! Choose your desired nature from a selection of Minecraft and Touhou inspired origins upon logging in for the first time. These will change the way you play the game, but make it much more exciting and enciting. Go on and explore!

This pack encompasses the wonders of magic mods with the clockwork logic of technical mods. Be sure to explore the whimsical land and encounter new allies, foes and bosses to defeat, or learn the ways to access new worlds, planets and realms!

The sky is the limit in **Yukkuricraft: Border of Magic & Tech**!

## Mod Spotlight

**[Arcadian Dream](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcadian-dream)**

**[Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)**

**[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (and a good bunch of its addons)**

**[Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization)**

**[Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) (with [Touhou Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-origins) & [Blessings](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-origins-blessings))**

**[More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers-fabric)**

**And many more...**

This pack has been further optimized to make your gameplay as smooth as possible!

## Server
Yukkuricraft is a Touhou community in Minecraft with a major server instanced in the Vanilla version of the game and now, you can join us in a more fantastical version by joining the **Official Yukkuricraft: Border of Magic & Tech Server**! Simply load up your game and click on the respective button in the main menu, hope to see you there!

Be sure to check our [discord server](discord.gg/yukkuricraft) for our Rules and Guide!
